ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "original_language" TEXT /* Original language of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue of the movie */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* Path to the movie's poster */,
  "backdrop_path" TEXT /* Path to the movie's backdrop image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_keywords" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_member" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  "profile_path" TEXT /* Path to the cast member's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "crew_member" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the crew member */,
  "profile_path" TEXT /* Path to the crew member's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, moderator, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_movie_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_movie_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_movie_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_movie_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_movie_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_movie_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_trailers" (
  "trailer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trailer */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the trailer */,
  "trailer_type" TEXT /* Type of the trailer (e.g. official, teaser, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trailer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_trailers_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g. poster, backdrop, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_images_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_movies" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id", "movie_id")
)
column_names: Runtime of the movie in minutes
Path to the movie's backdrop image

Name of the character played by the cast member
Path to the cast member's profile picture
Unique identifier for each crew member
Path to the crew member's profile picture

ID of the user who gave the rating
ID of the movie being rated

ID of the movie being reviewed
